steps.title: Document Verification
steps.description: Candidates must visit the designated nodal center with all original documents. Upon verification, you will receive a generic 'User ID' and 'Secret Key'.

steps.title: Online Registration
steps.description: Log in to the KEA portal using your CET Number and Captcha. Create a password and verify your details.

steps.title: Option Entry
steps.description: Enter your preferred colleges and courses in order of priority. There is no limit on the number of options you can enter. Think carefully!

steps.title: Mock Allotment
steps.description: KEA publishes a mock result to clear doubts and show you where you stand. You can modify your options after this.

steps.title: Final Seat Allotment
steps.description: Actual seat allotment results are published. You will be assigned a seat based on merit and priority.

steps.title: Post-Allotment Choice
steps.description: Choose one of 4 choices: Choice 1 (Accept & Join), Choice 2 (Accept & Upgrade), Choice 3 (Reject & Next Round), Choice 4 (Exit).

steps.title: Fee Payment & Admission Order
steps.description: If you select Choice 1 or 2, pay the prescribed fees online and download your Admission Order.

steps.title: College Reporting
steps.description: Visit the allotted college with your Admission Order and original documents to complete the process.

steps.title: KEA Registration
steps.description: Even for NEET, you must register on the KEA portal for Karnataka state quota seats.

steps.title: Document Verification
steps.description: Similar to Engineering, verify documents at nodal centers. Ensure NEET scorecard is included.

steps.title: Option Entry (Medical)
steps.description: Enter options for Medical, Dental, and AYUSH courses separately from engineering options.

steps.title: Seat Allotment
steps.description: Seats are allotted based on NEET All India Rank (AIR) and state reservation policies.

steps.title: Admission & Reporting
steps.description: Pay fees to KEA (not college directly) and report to the medical college.

documents.name: KCET/NEET Application Form
documents.details: Printout of the final submitted application form.

documents.name: Admission Ticket (Hall Ticket)
documents.details: Original Admission Ticket with invigilator signature.

documents.name: Study Certificate (7 Years)
documents.details: Countersigned by BEO/DDPI showing 7 years of study in Karnataka.

documents.name: Caste / Income Certificate
documents.details: Issued by Tahasildar (for SC/ST/OBC and Fee Exemption).

documents.name: Rural Study Certificate
documents.details: If claiming Rural quota (1st to 10th Std).

documents.name: Passport Size Photos
documents.details: 2 recent photos (same as uploaded in application).

faq.q: Can I edit my options after Mock Allotment?
faq.a: Yes! The main purpose of Mock Allotment is to let you change valid priority of options.

faq.q: What happens if I don't report to college?
faq.a: Your seat will be cancelled and you may not be allowed in subsequent rounds (depending on Choice selected).
